summary.tldr: The Q2 planning meeting covered the API delay issue, design review, onboarding flow, and team retrospective. The team decided to reduce the scope of the project by deferring the reporting module to v1.1. They also discussed the design review, onboarding flow, and team retrospective, assigning tasks to team members.

topics.title: API Delay Issue
topics.summary: The team discussed the API delay issue from last week. The API integration is still not complete, and they are about three days behind schedule. They decided to reduce the scope of the project by deferring the reporting module to v1.1. Bob will notify the client about the scope change and get their sign-off by Friday. Carol will update the project timeline to reflect this by end of day tomorrow.
topics.supporting_quote: Decision made ΓÇö reporting module deferred to v1.1.

topics.title: Design Review
topics.summary: The team discussed the design review. Carol shared the new dashboard mockups in Slack, and the client loved the color scheme but wants larger fonts. Bob will update the mockups with the font size changes and have revised versions ready by Wednesday.
topics.supporting_quote: The client loved the color scheme but wants larger fonts.

topics.title: Onboarding Flow
topics.summary: The team discussed the onboarding flow. There's been feedback that it's confusing, specifically the third step where users don't understand they need to verify email before proceeding. Carol will draft a clearer prompt at that step and an email template, and have a draft by Tuesday.

topics.title: Team Retrospective
topics.summary: The team discussed the team retrospective. The overall sentiment was that the sprint was rough but they made progress. They decided to add more buffer time for external dependencies to their process. Bob will document this as a lesson learned in the engineering wiki by next Monday.
topics.supporting_quote: The API issues slowed us down more than expected.

speaker_observations.speaker: Alice
speaker_observations.observation: Alice's tone was overall positive and facilitative throughout the meeting.

speaker_observations.speaker: Bob
speaker_observations.observation: Bob's tone was mostly neutral, with some positive moments when discussing solutions.

speaker_observations.speaker: Carol
speaker_observations.observation: Carol's tone was mostly neutral, with some moments of uncertainty when discussing the onboarding flow.

summary.tldr: The team discussed the API integration, dashboard mockups, onboarding email verification, engineering wiki, performance issue, and cross-meeting analytics. The API integration is complete, dashboard mockups are approved, and the onboarding email verification copy is being implemented. The team also identified a performance issue with the dashboard load time and a new feature request for cross-meeting analytics.

topics.title: API Integration
topics.summary: The team discussed the API integration, which is now complete and has passed smoke tests. The reporting module is still deferred to v1.1. The client has signed off on the scope change. The API integration was a major blocker last week, but it is now resolved. The team is moving forward with the project.
topics.supporting_quote: The API integration is complete as of yesterday. We shipped it to staging and it passed smoke tests.

topics.title: Dashboard Mockups
topics.summary: The team discussed the dashboard mockups, which have been updated with larger font sizes and better contrast. The client has approved the revised mockups. The dashboard mockups are now closed. The team is moving forward with the project.
topics.supporting_quote: Done. I sent revised mockups to the client this morning. They approved within the hour.

topics.title: Onboarding Email Verification
topics.summary: The team discussed the onboarding email verification step, which is still confusing users. The copy changes are being implemented today. The team also discussed adding a 24-hour reminder email. The onboarding email verification is a priority item. The team needs to resolve this issue as soon as possible.

topics.title: Engineering Wiki
topics.summary: The team discussed the engineering wiki, which now includes the API dependency lesson learned. The team is keeping track of process improvements. The engineering wiki is up to date. The team is moving forward with the project.
topics.supporting_quote: I did that Monday. It is under the process improvements section.

topics.title: Performance Issue
topics.summary: The team discussed the performance issue with the dashboard load time, which is currently around four seconds. The team needs to investigate and profile the queries to fix the issue. The performance issue is urgent and needs to be resolved by Thursday. The team is working on a fix.
topics.supporting_quote: I clocked it at around four seconds on a cold load. That is not acceptable for a product demo.

topics.title: Cross-Meeting Analytics
topics.summary: The team discussed the cross-meeting analytics feature request, which is not in the original scope. The team decided to mock up the feature for the demo and build it properly after launch. The cross-meeting analytics is a new feature request. The team is working on a mockup.
topics.supporting_quote: Can we mock it up for the demo and build it properly post-launch?

speaker_observations.speaker: Alice
speaker_observations.observation: Alice's tone is positive and directive, driving the discussion forward.

speaker_observations.speaker: Bob
speaker_observations.observation: Bob's tone is positive and informative, providing updates on the API integration and performance issue.

speaker_observations.speaker: Carol
speaker_observations.observation: Carol's tone is positive and concerned, raising questions about the performance issue and its impact on the demo.
